title: Chestnut and Tagine Stuffed Portobellos
description: A flavorful vegetarian dish where Portobello mushrooms are filled with a rich and creamy chestnut and tagine mixture, then baked to perfection.

ingredients.name: 4 Portobello mushrooms
ingredients.amount: cap removed and stems finely chopped
ingredients.notes: any type of mushroom can be used

ingredients.name: 2 cloves garlic
ingredients.notes: use 1 clove if you're not a big fan of garlic

instructions: In a pan, heat the olive oil and sauté the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped mushroom stems, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and cook until the mixture is heated through.
Stir in the mashed chestnut and tagine.
Wipe the mushroom caps clean with a damp cloth and fill each cap with the chestnut and tagine mixture.
Place the stuffed mushrooms in a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the mushrooms are tender and the filling is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
